title: NATIONAL HUMAN TRAFFICKING HOTLINE - 211info
text: POLARIS NATIONAL HUMAN TRAFFICKING HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a national, toll-free hotline available to answer calls, texts, and chats serving victims and survivors of human trafficking and the anti-trafficking community. Also provides a tip line for reports of potential human trafficking. The hotline is a non-profit, non-governmental organization working exclusively on the issue of human trafficking and is not associated with law enforcement or immigration authorities. Eligibility: Hotline: Individuals who are compelled to engage in commercial sex through force, fraud, or coercion OR under 18 and engaging in commercial sex, regardless of whether force, fraud, or coercion is also taking place Tip Line: Unrestricted Hours: Hotline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (888) 373-7888 24 7 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (888) 373-7888 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Administration (202) 790-6300 Text Short Code 233733 Text BEFREE Or HELP to speak to an advocate Text Short Code 233733 Text INFO for information about human trafficking Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, text, or visit website to chat with an advocate FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: Anti-Trafficking Hotline advocates speak English and Spanish, and have access to 24-hour tele-interpreting service to communicate with callers in more than 200 additional languages. Chat, email, text, and online tip report services available in English and Spanish only. AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Child Sexual Exploitation Reporting Human Trafficking Hotlines If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
